title: One practice, four settings.
subtitle: Every session weaves asana (postures), pranayama (breath), meditation, and relaxation.

tiles.title: Private session at the studio
tiles.blurb: Private studio in Paris 16 (Passy). Tailored to you, precise alignment, individual progression.

tiles.title: Session at your place
tiles.blurb: Paris and inner suburbs. You choose the place, time, and pace.

tiles.title: Yoga at the office
tiles.blurb: Weekly classes or workshops. Already partnered with Semmaris via TrainMe.

tiles.title: Open-air sessions
tiles.blurb: Champ-de-Mars, Parc Montsouris. Open sessions announced on MeetUp « Paris Hatha yoga ».
